name: Sharan Giri
tagline: ML & Data Platform Engineer | Production Systems | Ex-Barclays
one_liner: I build production ML systems that solve real problems

about.text:
My interest in data started watching cricket. Seeing the Decision Review System predict ball trajectories in real time using cameras, weather data, and bowler history showed me how data could make split second decisions more accurate. It got me thinking about how the same approach could work anywhere there are patterns.

I now build LLM and RAG systems, agentic pipelines, and evaluation frameworks that make AI outputs reliable in production. I care about systems that actually work when deployed, not just in notebooks.

Before that I spent 2 years at Barclays building automation pipelines that saved 85 hours monthly and reduced false alarms by 72%. Working with traders and operations teams taught me to ask better questions first and build second. What slows you down, where do errors happen, what would actually save you time. That mindset stuck with me. The most sophisticated architecture means nothing if the people using it do not trust it or understand what it is doing.

I am looking for AI Engineer and ML Engineer roles where building reliable systems and real user impact both matter. Outside work I follow cricket religiously, love watching movies, experimenting with new recipes in the kitchen, and spending time with friends.
